features.label: Finder
features.rationale: Uses the isolated review search and system-detail data set.

features.label: System Detail
features.rationale: Uses the production System Detail contract against review data.

features.label: Watchlist / saved systems
features.rationale: Uses scoped disposable watchlist routes against the review database.

features.label: My Work
features.rationale: Local project state and scoped saved-system data are safe for review.

features.label: Colony Planner
features.rationale: Uses real planner, simulation, evidence, validation, and suggested-build contracts against review data.

features.label: Planner warehouse/provenance evidence
features.rationale: Uses review-safe planner evidence and provenance routes.

features.label: Observed Evidence and Validation
features.rationale: Uses disposable observed facts plus passive compare/review endpoints.

features.label: Suggested Builds
features.rationale: Uses the real deterministic optimiser candidate route against review data.

features.label: Map
features.rationale: Visible to normal hosted-review users and backed by real read-only map routes.

features.label: Admin
features.rationale: Operational write and status surfaces are not part of player review.

features.label: Operator
features.rationale: Operator visibility surfaces remain outside normal player review.

features.label: Search Tuning
features.rationale: Advanced rerank tooling is outside the current hosted-review player journey.

features.label: Profile Sync
features.rationale: Hosted review has no accounts or durable user state to preserve.
